zh.lifeSummary: 當Philip Englefield於大約1376年出生在英國英格蘭波克夏恩格利費爾德時，他的父親Philip de Englefield30歲，母親Joan Coffin25歲。他於大約1404年與Alice Rossell結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1429年在他的家鄉享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏恩格利費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philip Englefield于大约1376年出生在英国英格兰波克夏恩格利費爾德时，他的父亲Philip de Englefield30岁，母亲Joan Coffin25岁。他于大约1404年与Alice Rossell结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1429年在他的家乡享年55岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波克夏恩格利費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Englefield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from either of two places called Englefield (in Berks and Surrey).  Compare  Inglefield  .

variants.name: Inglefield
meanings: English: locative name from Englefield (Surrey), recorded as Ingelfeld in 1282, or Englefield (Berks).

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

en.lifeSummary: When Philip Englefield was born about 1376, in Englefield, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Philip de Englefield, was 30 and his mother, Joan Coffin, was 25. He married Alice Rossell about 1404. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1429, in his hometown, at the age of 55, and was buried in Englefield, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philip Englefield est né environ 1376, à Englefield, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Philip d’Englefield, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Joan Coffin, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Alice Rossell environ 1404. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1429, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Englefield, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philip Englefield um 1376 in Englefield, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Philip de Englefield 30 und seine Mutter Joan Coffin 25. Er hat um 1404 Alice Rossell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1429 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Englefield, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philip Englefield è nato il circa 1376 nel Englefield, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Philip de Englefield, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Joan Coffin, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Alice Rossell circa 1404. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1429, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Englefield, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Philip Englefieldが約1376年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアエングレフィールドで生まれた時，父Philip de Englefieldは30歳，母Joan Coffinは25歳であった。約1404年にAlice Rossellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1429年に故郷で55歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスバークシュアイアエングレフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Philip Englefield(이)가 대략 1376년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 잉글레필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philip de Englefield(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Coffin(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1404년 Alice Rossell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1429년 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 잉글레필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philip Englefield nasceu aproximadamente 1376, em Englefield, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Philip de Englefield, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Joan Coffin, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Rossell aproximadamente 1404. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1429, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Englefield, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philip Englefield родился около 1376 г. в местности энглефиелд, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Philip de Englefield было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Coffin, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Rossell около 1404 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1429 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности энглефиелд, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philip Englefield nació aproximadamente 1376, en Englefield, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Philip de Englefield, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Joan Coffin, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Alice Rossell aproximadamente 1404. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1429, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Englefield, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
